rules.rule_text:
rule db_create_user
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a = "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES" nocase
		$b = "IDENTIFIED BY" nocase
		$c = "GRANT SELECT" nocase
		$d = "CREATE USER" nocase

	condition:
		2 of them
}
